purpose: Product on luxury bathroom marble counter with gold faucet, towel, plant.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Lifestyle product photography of {product_descriptor} placed on white Carrara marble bathroom counter with brushed gold faucet in background, folded white towel beside product, small green plant in white ceramic pot, natural soft daylight from off-camera window on right, lived-in luxury aesthetic, shot on 35mm at f/2.8, no text, no watermark, no people {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T12. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi skincare brands. Include subtle Najdi or Hejazi architectural detail in faucet hardware or tile pattern. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
